title: Squirrel Removal in West Brighton (Staten Island)
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in West Brighton, Staten Island. Humane trapping, exclusion & damage repair. Licensed experts. Call for fast service: $900-$2,500.
intro: West Brighton residents know that squirrels can quickly turn from charming wildlife into serious home invaders, infiltrating attics, damaging insulation, and chewing through electrical wiring. Our professional squirrel removal services in West Brighton provide humane, effective solutions to protect your Staten Island property from these persistent pests. With prices ranging from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, we offer comprehensive removal, exclusion, and repair services.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving West Brighton and Staten Island for years with specialized wildlife removal expertise. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of squirrel infestations in this residential neighborhood and use proven, humane methods to safely remove squirrels and prevent their return.
localContext: West Brighton's tree-lined streets and mix of single-family homes, townhouses, and apartment buildings near Forest Avenue and the Staten Island Expressway provide ideal habitats for gray squirrels seeking shelter. The area's mature oak and maple trees offer easy access points to rooflines and attics, making professional exclusion services particularly important for homeowners near neighborhoods like Castleton Corners and Westerleigh.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in West Brighton?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in West Brighton typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the extent of the infestation, number of entry points, and necessary repairs. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work to seal entry points, and cleanup of contaminated insulation or droppings.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my West Brighton attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds during early morning or evening hours, visible damage to soffits or roof vents, chewed wires or insulation, droppings in the attic, and seeing squirrels repeatedly entering or exiting the same roof area. You may also notice an increase in squirrel activity on your roof or in nearby trees.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal humane and legal in Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Yes, our squirrel removal services are completely humane and comply with all New York State and NYC wildlife regulations. We use live traps and exclusion methods that safely remove squirrels without harm, then relocate them according to local guidelines while sealing entry points to prevent re-entry.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my West Brighton home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for West Brighton residents. The complete removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels and complexity of the infestation. We'll conduct an initial inspection, set traps, monitor daily, then perform exclusion work and repairs once all squirrels are removed.
